app.title: Gandi DNS Manager
auth.description: Manage your DNS records using the Gandi LiveDNS API.
auth.enterToken: Enter your Personal Access Token to get started.
auth.permission: Your token needs "Manage domain technical configurations" permission.
auth.storageMemoryHelp: Token lost on page reload (most secure)
auth.info: Your token is stored locally in your browser and sent directly to the Gandi API. It is never transmitted to any third-party server.
auth.emptyToken: Please enter a Personal Access Token
auth.invalidToken: Invalid token. Please check your Personal Access Token.
domain.label: Domain
records.title: DNS Records
records.selectDomain: Select a domain to view its DNS records.
records.filterByNameTypeValue: Filter records by name, type, or value
records.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, type, or value…
records.zone.placeholder: Paste zone file content here, or load a file…
records.deleteDetail: This action will be applied after a 5-second grace period.
records.replaceMessage: A {type} record already exists at "{name}". Replace it with the new values?
records.mergeMessage: A {type} record already exists at "{name}". Add the new value(s) to it?
records.deprecated: This record type is deprecated. Consider using the recommended alternative.
records.valuesRequired: At least one value is required
records.criticalWarning: Warning: This is a critical DNS record. Modifying it may affect email delivery or domain resolution.
records.bulkDeleteMessage: Delete {count} selected records? This action will be applied after a 5-second grace period.
records.bulkTTLHelp: New TTL will be applied to {count} selected records.
records.col.name: Name
records.nameHelp: Subdomain or @ for zone apex. Do not include the domain.
dnssec.title: DNSSEC Keys
dnssec.description: DNS Security Extensions (DNSSEC) protect against forged DNS responses. Keys shown below are used to sign DNS records for this domain.
dnssec.empty: No DNSSEC keys found. DNSSEC may not be enabled for this domain.
dnssec.managedNote: DNSSEC keys are managed by Gandi. To enable or disable DNSSEC, use the Gandi admin panel.
dnssec.kskTitle: Key Signing Key — signs the DNSKEY RRset
dnssec.zskTitle: Zone Signing Key — signs zone data
ns.title: Nameservers
ns.description: Nameservers responsible for serving DNS records for this domain. These are configured at the registrar level.
ns.empty: No nameservers found for this domain.
ns.registrarNote: Nameservers are configured at the registrar level. Changes here affect DNS resolution for the entire domain.
ns.editWarning: Changing nameservers affects the entire domain.
ns.editWarningDetail: DNS propagation may take 24-48 hours. Incorrect values can make your domain completely unreachable.
ns.propagationNote: Changes may take 24-48 hours to propagate worldwide.
settings.title: Settings
settings.appDescription: A single-page web UI for managing DNS records via the Gandi LiveDNS API.
settings.storageHelp: Storage mode is selected during authentication. Disconnect and reconnect to change it.
settings.apiHelp: The Gandi LiveDNS API endpoint. All requests are sent directly from your browser to this URL.
ui.copyFailed: Could not copy. Please copy manually.
history.title: Change History (Local)
history.description: Local log of DNS record modifications made through this interface.
history.emptyDomain: No changes recorded for this domain.
history.clearConfirm: Clear history? This cannot be undone.
history.rollbackConfirm: Rollback this change? This will execute an API call to reverse the operation.
history.exportTitle: Download zone state as text file
history.exportNoZone: No zone data available for this entry
shortcuts.title: Keyboard Shortcuts
shortcuts.tabs: Switch tab (Records / DNSSEC / NS / History / Settings)
api.networkError: Network error. Check your connection and CORS configuration.
api.authFailed: Authentication failed. Your token may be invalid or expired.
api.accessDenied: Access denied. Your token may not have sufficient permissions for this operation.
api.proxyDown: The proxy server appears to be unreachable. Make sure it is running.
validation.cnameAtApex: CNAME records cannot be created at the zone apex (@). Use an ALIAS record instead.
validation.wildcardLeftmost: Wildcard (*) must be the leftmost label only (e.g., * or *.sub)
validation.wildcardMultiLevel: Multi-level wildcards (*.*.domain) are not supported and almost always an error
validation.emptyLabel: Empty label (double dot) in record name
validation.labelInvalidChars: Label "{label}" contains invalid characters. Use letters, digits, hyphens, underscores.
validation.ttlNotInteger: TTL must be a whole number
validation.ttlMin: TTL minimum is {min} seconds (5 minutes). Gandi enforced limit.
validation.ttlMax: TTL maximum is {max} seconds (30 days). Gandi enforced limit.
validation.valueRequired: At least one value is required
validation.cnameOneValue: CNAME records must have exactly one value
validation.cnameConflict: Cannot create CNAME at "{name}": conflicts with existing {types} record(s). A CNAME cannot coexist with other record types.
validation.cnameExists: Cannot create {type} at "{name}": a CNAME record already exists here. A CNAME cannot coexist with other record types.
validation.dnameConflictCname: DNAME cannot coexist with CNAME at the same name (RFC 6672)
validation.dnameShadow: Warning: DNAME at "{name}" will shadow {count} child record(s). They will become unreachable.
validation.cnameConflictDname: Cannot create CNAME: a DNAME record exists at this name (RFC 6672)
validation.duplicate: Duplicate: a {type} record already exists at "{name}" with this value
validation.spfDuplicate: Warning: multiple SPF (v=spf1) TXT records at the same name violate RFC 7208. Only one SPF record should exist per name.
validation.cnameCircular: Circular CNAME chain detected: this record creates a loop.
validation.cnameChainDeep: Warning: CNAME chain is {depth} hops deep. Most resolvers give up after 8-16 hops.
types.A.label: A (IPv4 Address)
types.A.description: Maps a hostname to an IPv4 address.
types.AAAA.label: AAAA (IPv6 Address)
types.AAAA.description: Maps a hostname to an IPv6 address.
types.CNAME.label: CNAME (Canonical Name)
types.CNAME.description: Alias one name to another. Cannot be at zone apex (@).
types.MX.label: MX (Mail Exchange)
types.TXT.label: TXT (Text)
types.TXT.description: Arbitrary text data. Used for SPF, DKIM, DMARC, domain verification.
types.SRV.label: SRV (Service Locator)
types.SRV.description: Defines the location of servers for specified services.
types.CAA.label: CAA (Certification Authority Authorization)
types.CAA.description: Specifies which CAs can issue certificates for this domain.
types.NS.label: NS (Name Server)
types.NS.description: Delegates a subdomain to a set of name servers.
types.PTR.label: PTR (Pointer)
types.ALIAS.label: ALIAS (ANAME)
types.ALIAS.description: CNAME-like record that works at the zone apex. Gandi-specific.
types.DNAME.label: DNAME (Delegation Name)
types.DNAME.description: Redirects an entire subtree. Cannot coexist with CNAME at the same name.
types.SSHFP.label: SSHFP (SSH Fingerprint)
types.SSHFP.description: SSH host key fingerprint for DANE SSH validation.
types.TLSA.label: TLSA (TLS Authentication)
types.DS.label: DS (Delegation Signer)
types.DS.description: DNSSEC delegation signer record for subdomain delegation.
types.SOA.label: SOA (Start of Authority)
types.SOA.description: Zone authority record. Managed by Gandi (read-only).
types.CDS.label: CDS (Child DS)
types.HTTPS.label: HTTPS (HTTPS Service)
types.SVCB.label: SVCB (Service Binding)
types.KEY.label: KEY (Public Key)
types.OPENPGPKEY.label: OPENPGPKEY (OpenPGP)
types.RP.label: RP (Responsible Person)
types.SPF.label: SPF (Sender Policy Framework)
types.SPF.description: DEPRECATED: Use TXT records for SPF instead.
types.WKS.label: WKS (Well Known Services)
types.LOC.label: LOC (Location)
types.NAPTR.label: NAPTR (Naming Authority Pointer)
types.A.fields.value.label: IPv4 Address
types.A.fields.value.help: Format: x.x.x.x (each octet 0-255, no leading zeros)
types.AAAA.fields.value.label: IPv6 Address
types.CNAME.fields.value.label: Target Hostname
types.CNAME.fields.value.help: Fully qualified domain name (must not be an IP address)
types.MX.fields.priority.label: Priority
types.MX.fields.target.label: Mail Server
types.MX.fields.target.help: Hostname of the mail server (must not be an IP or CNAME)
types.TXT.fields.value.label: Text Value
types.TXT.fields.value.help: Enclose in quotes. Long values (>255 chars) are auto-split.
types.SRV.fields.priority.label: Priority
types.SRV.fields.weight.label: Weight
types.SRV.fields.weight.help: Relative weight for records with same priority
types.SRV.fields.port.label: Port
types.SRV.fields.target.label: Target Host
types.SRV.fields.target.help: Use "." to indicate service is unavailable
types.CAA.fields.flags.label: Flags
types.CAA.fields.flags.help: 0 = non-critical, 128 = critical (CA must understand this tag)
types.CAA.fields.tag.label: Tag
types.CAA.fields.cavalue.label: Value
types.CAA.fields.cavalue.help: CA domain for issue/issuewild, URL for iodef, contact for others
types.ALIAS.hint: Target hostname (e.g., example.com.). Works at apex where CNAME cannot.
types.DNAME.hint: Target domain (e.g., other.example.com.). Warning: shadows all child records.
types.TLSA.hint: Format: usage selector matching-type cert-data-hex (e.g., 3 1 1 abcdef...)
types.DS.hint: Format: keytag algorithm digest-type digest (e.g., 12345 13 2 abcdef...)
types.SPF.hint: Same syntax as SPF in TXT. This record type is deprecated (RFC 7208).
types.LOC.hint: Format: lat lon alt (e.g., 52 22 23.000 N 4 53 32.000 E -2.00m)
types.NAPTR.hint: Format: order preference flags service regexp replacement
types.TXT.warnings.spf: SPF record detected. Ensure only one SPF TXT record exists per name.
types.TXT.warnings.dmarc: DMARC record detected. Should be at _dmarc subdomain.
types.validate.missingTrailingDot: Target does not end with a dot (.). Without the trailing dot, it will be interpreted as relative to the zone.
types.validate.targetMustBeHostname: {type} target must be a hostname, not an IP address
types.TXT.validate.controlChars: TXT value contains invalid control characters
types.SSHFP.validate.fieldCount: SSHFP needs 3 fields: algorithm type fingerprint
types.SSHFP.validate.fpLength: Fingerprint length should be {expected} hex chars for {hash}
types.TLSA.validate.fieldCount: TLSA needs 4 fields: usage selector matching-type certificate-data
types.TLSA.validate.sha256Length: SHA-256 hash must be 64 hex characters
types.TLSA.validate.sha512Length: SHA-512 hash must be 128 hex characters
types.DS.validate.fieldCount: DS needs 4 fields: keytag algorithm digest-type digest
types.CAA.warn.issueLooksLikeUrl: CA value looks like a URL. For issue/issuewild, use the CA domain only (e.g., letsencrypt.org).
types.CAA.warn.issueContainsAt: CA value contains @. For contactemail, select the contactemail tag. For issue/issuewild, use the CA domain only.
validation.singleValueOnly: {type} records must have exactly one value
validation.aliasConflict: Cannot create ALIAS at "{name}": conflicts with existing {types} record(s). ALIAS cannot coexist with other record types.
validation.aliasExists: Cannot create {type} at "{name}": an ALIAS record already exists here. ALIAS cannot coexist with other record types.
